best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-003 title: user login with valid credentials module: authentication source pages: 2 preconditions: user has a valid account. test data: - email: test@example.com - password: test123 test steps: 1. user enters email and password into the ui. 2. ui sends the data to firebaseauthentication. 3. firebaseauthentication validates the credentials. 4. firebaseauthentication retrieves user data from firestore. 5. firebaseauthentication returns a token to the ui. 6. ui displays a success message to the user. expected result: user is logged in successfully.

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-002 title: user registration with invalid credentials module: user management source pages: 2,3 preconditions: test data: - email: test@example.com - password: invalidpassword test steps: 1. user enters email and password into the ui. 2. ui sends the data to firebase/authentication. 3. firebase/authentication validates the data. 4. firebase/authentication returns an error message to the ui. 5. ui displays an error message to the user. expected result: user account creation fails due to invalid credentials.
